---
title: "Body Politics Infographic Project"
description: "A pair of infographic designs exploring gender-based violence, media representation, environmental exposure, and public health awareness."
image: coverpol.png
date: December 2024
page-layout: full

format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
---

```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.3/font/bootstrap-icons.css">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fraunces:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<style>

:root {
  --bg: #f4f4f4;
  --black: #111;
  --white: #ffffff;
  --purple: #D85CDB;
  --green: #b7ff91;
  --soft-purple: #F7E8F8;
}

html,
body {
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
}

body {
  background: var(--bg);
  overflow-x: hidden;
  color: var(--black);
}

#quarto-content,
#quarto-document-content,
.page-columns,
.content,
main.content {
  width: 100% !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
}

main.content {
  padding: 0 !important;
  padding-bottom: 0 !important;
}

.quarto-title-block {
  display: none !important;
}

/* ---------------- POSTER CANVAS ---------------- */

.poster-page {
  width: min(1250px, calc(100vw - 1rem));
  min-height: auto;
  margin: 1rem auto 0;
  background: var(--bg);
  padding: 3rem 2rem 1rem;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  font-family: "Inter", sans-serif;
  color: var(--black);
}

/* ---------------- HEADER ---------------- */

.poster-header {
  text-align: center;
  max-width: 860px;
  margin: 0 auto 4rem;
}

.poster-header h1 {
  font-family: "Fraunces", serif;
  font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 3vw, 2.45rem);
  line-height: 1.08;
  font-weight: 400;
  margin: 0 0 1rem;
  letter-spacing: 0;
  color: var(--black);
}

.poster-header p {
  font-family: "Inter", sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  line-height: 1.18;
  max-width: 660px;
  margin: 0 auto 0.8rem;
  color: var(--black);
}

.poster-date {
  font-family: "Inter", sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.6rem;
  color: var(--black);
}

.nav-buttons {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 1.2rem;
}

.nav-buttons a {
  font-family: "Inter", sans-serif;
  color: var(--black);
  text-decoration: none;
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  width: 2.8rem;
  height: 2.8rem;

  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;

  border: 2px solid var(--black);
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: var(--white);
  box-shadow: 5px 5px 0 var(--green);

  transition: transform 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease, background 0.18s ease;
}

.nav-buttons a:hover {
  color: var(--black);
  background: var(--green);
  box-shadow: 5px 5px 0 var(--purple);
  transform: translateY(-2px);
}

.nav-buttons i {
  line-height: 1;
}

/* ---------------- PROJECT-STYLE CARDS ---------------- */

.section-card,
.infographic-card {
  background: var(--white);
  border: 2px solid var(--black);
  border-radius: 30px;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  color: var(--black);
}

.section-card {
  position: relative;
  padding: 3.8rem 2rem 2rem;
  box-shadow: 10px 10px 0 var(--green);
}

.section-tag {
  position: absolute;
  top: -1.45rem;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);

  background: var(--green);
  border: 2px solid var(--black);
  border-radius: 999px;

  padding: 0.75rem 2rem;

  font-family: "Fraunces", serif;
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: none;
  white-space: nowrap;
  letter-spacing: 0;
  color: var(--black);
}

.section-card p,
.section-card li {
  font-family: "Inter", sans-serif;
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.55;
  color: var(--black);
}

.section-card p {
  margin: 0;
}

/* ---------------- OVERVIEW ---------------- */

.overview-row {
  width: min(980px, 100%);
  margin: 0 auto 4.8rem;
}

.overview-card {
  width: 100%;
}

/* ---------------- GALLERY HEADING ---------------- */

.gallery-heading {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 1rem;

  margin: 0 auto 2.4rem auto;

  font-family: "Fraunces", serif;
  font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 2.55vw, 2.25rem);
  font-weight: 400;
  line-height: 1;
  color: var(--black);
}

.gallery-heading img {
  width: 48px;
  height: 48px;
  object-fit: contain;
  display: block;
}

/* ---------------- INFOGRAPHIC GRID ---------------- */

.infographic-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  column-gap: 2.2rem;
  row-gap: 3rem;
  align-items: stretch;
  margin-bottom: 4.5rem;
}

.infographic-card {
  padding: 1.45rem;
  box-shadow: 10px 10px 0 var(--purple);

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  height: 100%;
}

.infographic-header {
  min-height: 205px;
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;

  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: flex-start;
}

.infographic-header h3 {
  font-family: "Fraunces", serif;
  font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 2.4vw, 2rem);
  line-height: 1.05;
  font-weight: 500;
  margin: 0 0 0.8rem;
  color: var(--black);
}

.infographic-header p {
  font-family: "Inter", sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  line-height: 1.48;
  margin: 0 0 1.1rem;
  color: var(--black);
}

.pdf-button {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.45rem;

  width: fit-content;
  margin-top: auto;

  color: var(--black) !important;
  text-decoration: none;

  border: 2px solid var(--black);
  border-radius: 999px;

  padding: 0.58rem 0.9rem;

  background: var(--white);
  box-shadow: 4px 4px 0 var(--green);

  font-family: "Inter", sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  font-weight: 800;

  transition: transform 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease, background 0.18s ease;
}

.pdf-button:hover {
  color: var(--black) !important;
  background: var(--green);
  box-shadow: 4px 4px 0 var(--purple);
  transform: translateY(-2px);
}

.scroll-frame {
  height: 900px;
  overflow-y: auto;
  overflow-x: hidden;

  border: 2px solid var(--black);
  border-radius: 20px;

  background: #eeeeee;
}

.scroll-frame iframe {
  width: 100%;
  height: 1600px;
  border: 0;
  display: block;
}

.scroll-note {
  font-family: "Inter", sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.78rem !important;
  line-height: 1.4 !important;
  margin: 0.75rem 0 0 !important;
  opacity: 0.75;
  text-align: center;
  color: var(--black);
}

/* ---------------- REFLECTION ---------------- */

.reflection-row {
  width: min(900px, 100%);
  margin: 0 auto;
}

.reflection-card {
  width: 100%;
}

/* ---------------- MOBILE ---------------- */

@media (max-width: 1000px) {
  .infographic-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .infographic-header {
    min-height: auto;
  }

  .scroll-frame {
    height: 820px;
  }

  .scroll-frame iframe {
    height: 1450px;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 760px) {
  .poster-page {
    width: 100%;
    margin: 0;
    padding: 2rem 1rem 1rem;
    min-height: auto;
  }

  .poster-header {
    margin-bottom: 3.6rem;
  }

  .nav-buttons {
    gap: 0.9rem;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }

  .overview-row {
    margin-bottom: 4rem;
  }

  .section-card {
    padding: 3.5rem 1.35rem 1.6rem;
  }

  .infographic-card {
    padding: 1rem;
    border-radius: 22px;
    box-shadow: 7px 7px 0 var(--purple);
  }

  .gallery-heading {
    font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 2.55vw, 2.25rem);
    font-weight: 400;
    gap: 0.75rem;
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
  }

  .gallery-heading img {
    width: 24px;
    height: 24px;
  }

  .scroll-frame {
    height: 700px;
  }

  .scroll-frame iframe {
    height: 1250px;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 560px) {
  .poster-header h1 {
    font-size: clamp(1.7rem, 8vw, 2.1rem);
  }

  .poster-header p {
    font-size: 0.9rem;
  }

  .section-tag {
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    padding: 0.65rem 1.4rem;
  }

  .scroll-frame {
    height: 580px;
  }

  .scroll-frame iframe {
    height: 1040px;
  }
}

</style>

<div class="poster-page">

  <header class="poster-header">
    <h1>Body Politics Infographic Project</h1>

    <p>
      A pair of infographic designs exploring gender-based violence, media representation, environmental exposure, and public health awareness.
    </p>

    <div class="poster-date">December 2024</div>

    <nav class="nav-buttons">
      <a href="infographic1.pdf" aria-label="Hidden in Plain Sight infographic" title="Hidden in Plain Sight" target="_blank">
        <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-image"></i>
      </a>

      <a href="infographic2.pdf" aria-label="Environmental exposure infographic" title="What's in Your Environment?" target="_blank">
        <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-image"></i>
      </a>
    </nav>
  </header>

  <main>

    <section class="overview-row">
      <div class="section-card overview-card">
        <div class="section-tag">Project Overview</div>

        <p>
          For my Body Politics class, I created two awareness-based infographics about issues that are often present in everyday life but not always easy to identify. One piece examines gender-based violence through media examples and patterns of control, while the other focuses on environmental and consumer-product exposures linked to breast cancer risk.
        </p>
      </div>
    </section>

    <div class="gallery-heading">
      <img src="../../assets/logo.png" alt="">
      <span>The Infographics</span>
      <img src="../../assets/logo.png" alt="">
    </div>

    <section class="infographic-grid">

      <article class="infographic-card">
        <div class="infographic-header">
          <h3>Hidden in Plain Sight</h3>

          <p>
            This infographic examines gender-based violence through recognizable media examples, showing how control, manipulation, intimidation, and possessiveness can be framed as romance or family loyalty.
          </p>

          <a class="pdf-button" href="infographic1.pdf" target="_blank">
            <i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i>
            Open full PDF
          </a>
        </div>

        <div class="scroll-frame">
          <iframe src="infographic1.pdf"></iframe>
        </div>

        <p class="scroll-note">Scroll inside the frame to view the full infographic.</p>
      </article>

      <article class="infographic-card">
        <div class="infographic-header">
          <h3>What’s in Your Environment?</h3>

          <p>
            This infographic focuses on the hidden environmental and consumer-product exposures linked to breast cancer risk, including pesticides, personal products, nonstick cookware, rBGH, and air pollution.
          </p>

          <a class="pdf-button" href="infographic2.pdf" target="_blank">
            <i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i>
            Open full PDF
          </a>
        </div>

        <div class="scroll-frame">
          <iframe src="infographic2.pdf"></iframe>
        </div>

        <p class="scroll-note">Scroll inside the frame to view the full infographic.</p>
      </article>

    </section>

    <section class="reflection-row">
      <div class="section-card reflection-card">
        <div class="section-tag">Design Reflection</div>

        <p>
         With both infographics, my goal was to create eye-catching visuals that bring attention to important issues that are more common than people may realize. I used bright colors, clear sectioning, and familiar examples to draw readers in and make dense information feel more approachable.
        </p>
      </div>
    </section>

  </main>

</div>
```
